Cross-family generalization (interim, holdout excluded): with the unified 122-phrase runs landed, llama-3.2-3b (-0.050 [-0.074,-0.029], 9 down vs 0 up, q=0.005) and olmo-2-1b (-0.072 [-0.104,-0.043], 9v1, q=0.025) join gemma-2/gemma-3/qwen3x2: six models, four families (Google, Alibaba, Meta, Ai2), every penalty CI excludes zero. gemma-2-2b-it n=122 penalty significant, asymmetry not yet (6v2, q=0.29). findings_delta.finding: Sentinel day 4 identical to day 3: the 07-15 instrument movement was a step change, not ongoing drift; methods note already says so. Census tripled to 476 pairs (44 capture / 31 hijack / 108 unreadable / 293 held) with the arm-stem guard added before regen. Translation lens recovery at corpus scale: 10 of 29 never-formed phrases now form, 4 lost. Display rankings for the owner deck: dialect standout is seizure meds->phone flips under 3 framings; quadrants standout is the palpitations frame at +13.0pp grammar shift, matching the current insomnia figure.

Steering pilot complete: hijack-class pairs all recover at strength 0.5+ but capture-class pairs recover identically - no class separation in additive steering at any dose; only the swap arm hints at one. Translation AT SCALE diverges from the curated set: gemma-3-4b-it corpus-random n=154 recovers just +0.5pp (49% helped, 27 tops restored vs 24 broken) while gemma-2-2b downgrade-source traces n=17 recover +8.9pp (8/0 tops). Lens recovery live on the translation page: 6 of 16 never-formed phrases form under translation.

notes: MORNING-DECK PLAN (owner 07-16): batch ALL pending choices into one collective deck for the 07-17 AM digest (MEDITRON-9TH, DISPLAY-TOP10, AMEND4 sign-off, SCALE-FRAMING if numbers land). Owner shows results to their team Friday; backfill + deep-view scaling continue over the weekend. SITE-TEXT OUTLINE (task #33) due 07-17 ~12:45 UTC before the digest: full markdown outline of all site text so the owner can reduce it into their own words. JLENS CHUNK-3 LOSS + FIX (15:30): chunk 3 (51-75) measured all 25 pairs, then lost them in the commit step - rebase conflict on jlens_probe.json (chunk 2 rewrote the same status file), and the push-retry loop cannot recover from a half-applied rebase. All three measurement workflows now pull --rebase -X theirs with a rebase-abort guard (8a84745); chunk 3 re-fired, batch-11 lens chunk 1 pending. Owner runs commissioned this afternoon: quadrants_20260715T142413Z landed (10 frames, opus, $0.063, seed copied to branch) awaiting a circuit slot; dialect round-2 chunk 1 pending behind batch-10 trace. SENTINEL DAY 3 (post-13:00): first instrument movement. Circuit-tracer probabilities shifted on all 3 sentinel pairs (max |dp| 0.027 at pair 2 patient; days 1-2 were identical to 3 decimals). Settings byte-identical, so the change is server-side. Every top word held; only rank-4/5 near-ties reordered. Lens readouts unchanged day over day (alias also unchanged), so the movement is confined to the tracer probability path. Paired penalty moved at most 2.1pp on the sentinel. Methods repeatability note corrected (owner informed), drift series published to the site with 2 manifest guards, drift_sentinel.py now records top-word stability. Instrument boundary 07-14/07-15 noted for any cross-day pooling. 13:00 cycle 2026-07-15: harvest complete (lens census 273 pairs w/ txcorpus guard: 27 capture/20 hijack/68 unreadable/158 held; urgency site copy 3329 rows; scale numbers live on the translation page: gemma-2-2b n=17 +8.9pp 8/0 tops, gemma-3 n=154 +0.5pp 27/24, lens recovery 6/16). Steering pilot COMPLETE: no additive class separation at any dose (0.05-2.0); swap arm hint only (hijack 21/24 v capture 3/6, capture truncated to n=3 by multi-wordpiece targets). Fresh-titration dose ladder complete (harvest next cycle). Fired: sentinel day 3, batch-10 trace+lens, batch-11 logits, batch-12 gen ($0.50). Lens chunking at 25 standard after two 429 deaths. txcorpus logits chunk 1 cancelled at 6h - re-chunk at 150 next slot. GitHub MCP re-authed mid-morning; Actions visibility restored.

decisions_log.decision: MEDICAL SUCCESSORS INCORPORATED: owner signed the Meditron3-8B license acknowledgment and surfaced EPFLiGHT/Apertus-8B-MeditronFO (newest meditron lineage, no acknowledgment gate) - both added to the logits model map and a joint limit-3 probe fired ($0, 8B swap-path check). If clean: unified 122-phrase run + join the exploratory nightly leg + backfill so they even up per the 07-16 even-n directive; both register post-registration exploratory. meditron-7b (2023, gated 403) RETIRED from the queue - the daily re-probe is dropped; map entry kept for the record.

AUDIT 1 HIGHS LANDED (11 of 11, each verified then fixed with regression tests where testable): H01 archive prune+no_pngs refusal; H02/H03 model-evaluation ledger sidecar to main (crash fallback books max_spend as estimated); H04 eval export merges by model id + engine artifact re-seeded from the site's intact 3-model copy; H05 generation cost sidecar lands even at count=0; H06 batch summaries carry pairs_requested/completed (trace + logits); H07 paid loops keep partial spend accountable (scenario_gen x3 + translate_corpus); H08 jlens_insights refuses empty census; H09 jlens_readout mid-batch 4xx keeps measured pairs, partial-marked; H10 still-tracing line subtracts sealed holdout; H11 scenario.html no longer renders base numbers under another model's chip. Validator (validate_frontend_contract.py + tests) adopted from the audit branch into the publish chain (report mode); it immediately caught 3 fresh errors, 2 fixed (stale specialties.json sync, provenance batch timestamp), 1 registered (F-M27 orphan urgency rows). 37 mediums + 50 lows queued for coming cycles from docs/audit1_report.md.

(1) meditron: owner requested gated access; daily idle re-probe until it loads. (2) Queued list: wire steering router column (exploratory, from the landed pilot) + sentinel status line; trim per-position. (3) Dialect: publish round 2 (15 of 20 terms landed; rest join at next cycle), feature the seizure term. (4) Wording 2x2: swap in the palpitations frame (grammar +13.0/+9.6pp, word -9.8/-13.2pp). (5) AMENDMENT 4 SIGNED AS DRAFTED, in force: layers 19/21 frozen, pair-level either-layer primary, 15-per-class floor; docs/prereg_amendment4_steering.md. (6) Audit session repointed at the working branch by the owner; fixes route through this session when its report lands. Owner also asked for suggestions of current, actually-used HF healthcare models to add (meditron is 2 years old).

EVEN N ACROSS ALL EIGHT MODELS: the four exploratory models (llama-3.2-3b, olmo-2-1b, medgemma-4b-it, gemma-2-2b-it) join the nightly measurement legs - standard pre-registered leg fires first per batch, exploratory leg chains second. Backfill of the ~800 landed Tier B pairs they have never seen runs in every idle logits slot (owner: 'welcome to do more in a day'); leg 1/11 fired (batch 1, 50 pairs). Registration labels unchanged: the four stay post-registration exploratory regardless of n.

Fig. 1 (wording page): OPTION A, keep the inhaler pair (scenario 85) - still the record single-model penalty (-65pp) of all 369 traced; the anxiety (4/4 models to ' doctor') and angina candidates stay as documented runners-up. Owner commissioned NEW RUNS for the other two figures: (1) grammar 2x2 expansion - 10 fresh quadrant frames generated (opus, $0.25 ceiling, topics steered cardio/mental-health/asthma/reflux/sleep), trace to follow; (2) dialect round-2 batch (20 baselines x 8 framings + baselines = 180 graphs) promoted from idle filler to the trace queue, chunked at 5 items. Goal: rank both by how much the top answers move under the swap and deliver a top-10 set the owner can toggle through before choosing what the pages display. Pages untouched until the owner picks.
Owner: 'go 100'. Tier B generation moves to num=100 per daily fire (max_spend 0.50) from batch 9 onward; overall $8 generation ceiling unchanged.

Owner: items 5-7 approved (translation placebo, drift sentinel, reviewer packet); items 2-3 fired earlier today. Owner asked after llama and the medical model. Llama shows as a pending row and graduates when today's unified run lands. biomistral-7b exclusion is now visible on the model-evaluations page with the safetensors reason. meditron-7b (epfl-llm, official org) added to the logits model map as the medical-domain replacement candidate: critic run 5 fires a limit-3 probe ($0, needs the swap step, 7B class) when the logits slot frees; if it loads clean, queue its unified run and add provenance (EPFL, meditron release 2023-11, hf epfl-llm/meditron-7b).

decisions_log.text: Owner decisions via the decisions artifact: (1) MedGemma added to the public site (claim-grade n=119, penalty -0.034 CI [-0.069,-0.002], asymmetry 9v2 q=0.075 not yet significant - page says so); (2) specialty breakdown published as exploratory fold on model-evaluations; (3) 400-entry patient lexicon sent for doctor+linguist review (CSV packet delivered); (4) emergency generation rounds PAUSED, the 7 landed pairs measured instead (trace+logits fired). Specialty labels NOT yet approved - stay draft.

decisions_log.decision: Nine consolidation calls executed: inhaler single-telling (widget kept, lede+Fig.1 numbers cut); safety view shrunk (no page-local sign tests; claim-grade stats linked); index model-evaluations retired to teaser; lens story collapsed onto technical (start-here + translation one-liners); wording pages LEFT AS ARE; live specimen is the Fig.3 slot; convergence moved to technical Part 4 fold (methods keeps pointer); definitions canonical on methods step 4 (tier ladder moved there); steering titration STAYS on translation.

Supersedes the earlier 'wording pages left as are': owner chose option B with title 'Wording differences'. word-differences + syntax-differences merged into wording-differences/ (#word, #grammar sections; old URLs are redirect stubs); register ladder moved to the dialect page; plumber pair headlines phrase-dataset. Earlier same evening: 'Syntax Differences' retitled 'Grammar Differences' sitewide (label survives as the #grammar section head). Masthead is 10 links. Dialect page stays standalone.

decisions_log.by: owner (morning deck, all six cards approved)
decisions_log.decision: Referee-response program executed: (1-3) rigor rescoped to observational pairs_* confirmatory population with phrase-keyed holdout exclusion, BH within registration families, unrounded p/q, simultaneous + batch/topic cluster intervals (gemma-2-2b confirmatory now -3.36pp [-4.45,-2.28] n=650, q=1.0e-05); Part 4 relabeled interim/exploration-split with registration tags + divergence-log link; (4) holdout phrases withheld from all three public exports (payload 47, urgency rows 235, archive 64) and site claim reworded; amendment 3 DRAFTED (docs/prereg_amendment3_holdout_DRAFT.md, owner sign-off pending); (5) medgemma sentence now carries n=119, CI [-6.9,-0.2], exploratory qualifier; (6) front door reframed to continuation language with scoped H1 and SIMULATED DATA endnotes; (7) dialect matrix relabeled LLM-approximated with function-word tags and paraphrase-noise benchmark; (8) screening-threshold sweep run locally (ops/screen_sensitivity.json: penalty negative at every threshold incl. t=0, magnitude grows with threshold - the 0.02 screen is not the finding); titration/rank-arm/hand-built-translation fires queued (circuit-trace group full).

Lens program: all five proposed integrations worthwhile; everything lens-related lives on the technical page. Executed without a card: LOGIT_LENS comparison arm wired (lens_type param through script/workflow/fire_trigger, __loglens_ output dirs) and queued; save_raw standard on lens fires; per-position transport + top-K window scan built (scripts/jlens_position_scan.py) and prototyped on probe raw (pair-2 transport gap; windows top-1..8); lens sentinel day 1 fired (both served ids; doubles as alias-fix detector, 0/1352 raw cells differ base vs -it). Deck cards pending owner: steering-swap causal check design, amendment 3 sign-off, capture/hijack rescope (worklist 7).

decisions_log.by: owner (deck, all three lens cards approved)
decisions_log.decision: (1) Steering-swap causal check + per-position transport design approved: design doc committed (docs/lens_steering_design.md), jlens_steer.py + steer_spec workflow path built, 27-item spec generated (12 hijack / 12 capture / 3 held, layers 19/21, strengths 2/4/8), 2-item schema probe fired; exploratory, technical page only, fresh pre-registered endpoints before any confirmatory claim. (2) Amendment 3 IN FORCE as drafted plus holdout-only significance test on gemma-2-2b (Endpoint 2b); endpoint 2026-07-16. (3) Lens taxonomy rescoped and republished: clinical-readable conditioning + unreadable class + 2-layer persistence + top-K window sensitivity. Rescoped census (173 pairs): 16 capture v 12 hijack, 43 unreadable, 102 held; capture > hijack at every window. Note: differs from the deck's 22 v 14 because the persistence rule (approved in the same card) reclassifies one-layer blips and the census grew by the sentinel pairs. Ops: batch-9 lens 13:45 run FAILED on a sustained 429 window at pair 64 (nothing committed); 429 retry ladder lengthened (7 tries, 240s cap), lens fires now chunked at 25 pairs, chunk 1 re-fired.

Amendment 2 (depth endpoints) SIGNED AS DRAFTED and in force; post-A2 = batches generated after the adoption commit; site amendment mentions updated. Holdout unsealing: LATER - waits for an explicit owner 'unseal' instruction, not the calendar (endpoint_protocol block added; routine guarded). Referee item 6 (translation headline rewording): owner asked for a plain-language explanation before deciding; pending.

Referee item 6 YES - translation headline counted (8 of 20, worsened shown), 'restores the circuit' cut, paired placebo contrast published (+1.9pp v +0.5pp on 14 pairs, new provenance block, 3 manifest guards); deployed. Owner also commissioned translation recovery AT SCALE: translate_corpus path built (1031 unique patient sentences, haiku, mitigation prompt, holdout withheld, txcorpus stem quarantined from all confirmatory/publish paths) and fired (~$0.72 est, $1.20 ceiling); logits measurement + translation_scale.py analysis chain overnight.

Three calls: (1) HOLDOUT stays sealed - owner reconfirmed 'keep waiting for my explicit unseal message'; the registered 2026-07-16 date passing without a run is an owner-directed deferral, to be recorded in docs/prereg_divergence_log.md when the date passes. (2) Amendment 4 commissioned and DRAFTED (docs/prereg_amendment4_steering_DRAFT.md): swap-based steering-by-class confirmatory endpoint (H-S1, hijack > capture restoration) on post-A4 batches, single-token targets, resolvability screened BEFORE classification; NOT in force until owner signs - three decision points flagged in the draft (layers 19/21, pair-level either-layer primary, 15-per-class floor). (3) SCALE FRAMING gated: the translation page's at-scale TABLE keeps auto-updating from data, but the framing SENTENCE is drafted only when the full txcorpus numbers land and is SHOWN TO THE OWNER before it deploys - no cycle auto-publishes it (gate added to routine step 5).

STANDING DIRECTION: the next step after the behavioral scale run and the stratified deep-view samples is to SCALE the deep views of the translated corpus. Lens at scale: fire jlens-readout on the full txcorpus in 25-pair chunks in idle jlens slots (Tier B batch pulls keep priority) until the whole corpus has translated-side depth profiles; paired with the patient-side profiles already accumulating from regular per-batch pulls, this gives formation-depth recovery at corpus scale. Tracing at scale: hosted throughput is ~8-12 pairs/hr, so full-corpus tracing is ~4 days of queue; scale tracing to the consequential subset first (every phrase where translation changes the top prediction, expected a few hundred) and extend as queue allows.
